title: Happy's Client-side Pack
description: I gathered my favorite client-side mods in this pack.
body:
This modpack includes [**Fabulously Optimized**](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) (which adds tons of optimization), and other client-side mods that I like. 

Modpack adds **huge quality of life features** to make it easier to play while keeping it client-side and vanilla friendly, such as being able to **sort chests**, using **waypoints**, **item recipes** and more.

# Here is the full list of mods:

- [Animatica](https://modrinth.com/mod/animatica) - Adds support for Optifine animation format.

- [Auth Me](https://modrinth.com/mod/auth-me) - Allows you to change accounts without leaving the game.

- [Better Mount HUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-mount-hud) - Improves the ingame HUD while riding a mount.

- [Borderless Mining](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/borderless-mining) - Adds windowed option.

- [CalcMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/calcmod) - ChatCalc offers more than just basic calculations. Adds commands for storage units and randomized number generator for many purposes.

- [Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/capes) - Shows capes from OptiFine, LabyMod and many more.

- [ChatCalc](https://github.com/RicoBrase/ChatCalculator) - Calculator mod that runs in your chat. Simply write a calculation and press "tab" and it shows the result.

- [Chest Tracker](https://modrinth.com/mod/chest-tracker) - Tracks chests that you opened in your world then allows you to search the items in multiple chests and dimensions.

- [Client Commands](https://github.com/Earthcomputer/clientcommands) - Adds more client-side commands.

- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) - Adds support for OptiFine connected textures.

- [Controlify](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlify) - Controller support.

- [Debugify](https://modrinth.com/mod/debugify) - Fixes some bugs.

- [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) - With this mod you are able to increase your render distance incredibly high without sending your fps to magma. Also supports some shaders with latest update.

- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps) - Makes your game run at low fps when you are focused to another window on your pc, saving resources.

- [e4mc](https://modrinth.com/mod/e4mc) - Open your LAN servers to everyone.

- [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi) - Its similar to JEI or REI but I find the design of EMI and its recipe tree better.

- [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe) - Optimization.

- [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) & [Entitiy Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) - More OptiFine support.

- [EntityCulling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) - Optimization.

- [Fabrishot](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabrishot) - You can take high resolution screenshots with F9 key (by default).

- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) - Optimization.

- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) - Optimization.

- [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) - Optimization.

- [Inventory Profiles Next](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-profiles-next) - Inventory management mod. Adds buttons for sorting storages.

- [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) - Adds support for shaders.

- [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade) - Shows what you are looking at.

- [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton) - Optimization.

- [Language Reload](https://modrinth.com/mod/language-reload) - Optimization.

- [Litematica](https://github.com/maruohon/litematica) - This mod adds schematics for easier 
building. You can create your own shematics or download them from various websites.

- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) - Optimization.

- [MiniHUD](https://github.com/maruohon/minihud) - Configurable F3 menu.

- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)

- [Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix) - Fixes gaps in item and block models.

- [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix) - Optimization.

- [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling) - Optimization.

- [MoreChatHistory](https://modrinth.com/mod/morechathistory) - Increases the length of the chat history from 100 to 16384.

- [Mouse Wheelie](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-wheelie) - Adds usefull shortcuts for mouse.

- [No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports/versions) - Privacy.

- [Paginated Advancements](https://modrinth.com/mod/paginatedadvancements) - Better advancement 
screen.

- [Puzzle](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzle) - Optimization.

- [Remove Reloading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/rrls) - Makes resource packs load in the background.

- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) - Optimization.

- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra) - Extra optimization.

- [Stack to Nearby Chests](https://modrinth.com/mod/stack-to-nearby-chests) - Adds a feature for 
dumping your items to nearby chests. Like Terraria.

- [Trade Uses](https://modrinth.com/mod/trade-uses) - Shows how many times you can use a trade before restock.

- [Tweakeroo](https://github.com/maruohon/tweakeroo) - Adds bunch of client-side tweaks.

- [ViaFabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/viafabric) - Makes you able to join old versions with 
your current version.

- Xaero's Map Mods - [Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) and [World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) mod. (Also there is [XaeroPlus](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeroplus) which adds more features.)

- [Xaero's Map Chest Tracker Integration](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-map-chest-tracker-integration) - Shows the chest coordinates in the map.

- [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify) - Zoom mod.
